perps-state.description: Full PerpsController persisted state from chrome.storage.local
perps-state.expression: (async () => { const s = await chrome.storage.local.get('data'); return JSON.stringify(s?.data?.PerpsController ?? null); })()

perps-positions.description: Cached open perps positions (cachedPositions field in PerpsController state)

perps-balance.description: Perps balances by provider (perpsBalances map: provider -> { totalBalance, unrealizedPnl, accountValue1dAgo, lastUpdated })

perps-orders.description: Cached open perps limit/stop orders (cachedOrders field in PerpsController state)

perps-provider.expression: (async () => { const s = await chrome.storage.local.get('data'); return JSON.stringify(s?.data?.PerpsController?.activeProvider ?? null); })()

perps-testnet.description: Whether perps is in testnet mode (isTestnet field in PerpsController state)
perps-testnet.expression: (async () => { const s = await chrome.storage.local.get('data'); return JSON.stringify(s?.data?.PerpsController?.isTestnet ?? false); })()

perps-feature-flag.description: Check if perpsEnabledVersion remote flag is configured in manifest._flags
perps-feature-flag.expression: (async () => { const manifest = chrome.runtime.getManifest(); const flags = manifest._flags?.remoteFeatureFlags; return JSON.stringify(flags?.perpsEnabledVersion ?? null); })()
